nasb.text: Which is as a bridegroom coming out of his chamber; It rejoices as a strong man to run his course.

esv.text: which comes out like a bridegroom leaving his chamber, and, like a strong man, runs its course with joy.

cnv.text: 太陽如同新郎出洞房， 又像勇士歡歡喜喜地跑路。

ccb.text: 太阳出来时，如步出洞房的新郎， 又如欢然奔跑赛程的健儿。

csbs.text: 太阳如同新郎出洞房， 又如勇士欢然奔路。
